title: CustomBulkResolutionOptions
description: CustomBulkResolutionOptions schema from Public API (Otter Public API).

updateNames.description: Update the linked entity's names to match the linked external entity's.

updatePrices.description: Update the linked entity's price to match the linked external entity's.

updateDescriptions.description: Update the linked entity's description to match the linked external entity's.

createUnmatchedEntities.description: Create unmatched external entities in the menu.

deleteMissingEntities.description: Delete entities that are missing external links.

copyEntityPaths.description: Copies the entity paths from the external menu.

assignItemsToLocations.description: If an item exists at a location in the POS, it will automatically be assigned to that location.

unassignItemsFromLocations.description: If an item is removed from a location in the POS, it will automatically be unassigned from that location.

updateMenuOrganization.description: The organization of modifiers into modifier groups, modifier groups into items and items into categories will be replicated from the POS menu.

updateItemArrangement.description: The arrangement of menu products as displayed in your POS will be replicated.
